# ContentCachingInformationCommand

**Device Management Command**

The command to get the status of the content caches on a device.

## Declaration

```swift
object ContentCachingInformationCommand
```

## Objects

- **ContentCachingInformationCommand.Command**: The command to get the status of the content caches on a device.

## Commands and responses

- **ContentCachingInformationResponse**: A response from the device after it processes the command to get the status of the content caches on a device.
